## Test Cases

### TC-ACT-001: UAT — AC-1: an equivalent relationship will be represented in D365 where one or more ship to (service account) is linked to a Bill to (billing account)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **TC ID** | TC-ACT-001 |
| **ALM ID** | *(pending — set by /alm sync)* |
| **Area Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\f466-account-management-bill-to-to-ship-to-relationship\ACT |
| **Iteration Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\Discovery |

| **Test Type** | UAT |

| **User Story** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **Mapped AC** | AC-1 |

**Preconditions:**
- UAT environment seeded with anonymised business data.
- Business user briefed on the scenario.

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Setup: a bill‑to is linked to multiple ship‑tos in Fusion | Test scenario state is ready |
| 2 | Perform: synced with D365  | Action executes |
| 3 | Validate: an equivalent relationship will be represented in D365 where one or more ship to (service account) is linked to a Bill to (billing account) | Outcome matches business expectation |

**Post-conditions:**
- Business user confirms outcome meets the operational requirement.

**Test Data:**
- Anonymised PII; representative master-data volumes.

**Notes:**
UAT sign-off is required per §7 Exit Criteria of the test plan.
